title: calycocarpum lyonii
intro: Calycocarpum lyonii, also known as Lyon's spurge or California spurge, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calycocarpum lyonii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain and spasms, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Calycocarpum lyonii can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on the specific health needs.
